text:

Log:
  uchardet is a C language binding of the original C++ implementation
  of the universal charset detection library by Mozilla.

  WWW: https://code.google.com/p/uchardet/

  PR:		195083
  Submitted by:	Yuri Victorovich <yuri@rawbw.com>
